# Traverse Hospitality — Full Site Information

> Colorado's locally managed vacation rental company. Book direct — no fees, lowest price guaranteed.

## Overview

Traverse Hospitality (booktraverse.com) is a direct-booking vacation rental company for Colorado's mountain markets. We manage 189+ properties across 6 markets — Crested Butte, Leadville, Vail, Avon, Granby, and Twin Lakes. By booking direct, guests avoid the 10-15% service fees charged by third-party platforms like Airbnb and VRBO. We are not a platform — we are the local management company.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.booktraverse.com
- Browse All Properties: https://www.booktraverse.com/properties
- Crested Butte: https://www.booktraverse.com/crested-butte
- Leadville: https://www.booktraverse.com/leadville
- Vail: https://www.booktraverse.com/vail
- Avon: https://www.booktraverse.com/avon
- Granby: https://www.booktraverse.com/granby
- Twin Lakes: https://www.booktraverse.com/twin-lakes
- Trip Planner: https://www.booktraverse.com/plan
- Property Management: https://www.booktraverse.com/property-management
- Blog: https://www.booktraverse.com/blog
- Contact: https://www.booktraverse.com/contact

## Markets

### Crested Butte / Mt. Crested Butte
Colorado's last great ski town. Ski-in/ski-out condos, slope-side buildings, and mountain homes near Crested Butte Mountain Resort.

Key buildings managed by Traverse:
- **Grand Lodge Crested Butte** (6 Emmons Loop, Mt. CB) — 50+ units, indoor/outdoor pool, hot tub, steam room, free parking. Pets in select units.
- **The Plaza Condominiums** (11 Snowmass Road, Mt. CB) — 13 units, hot tubs, sauna, tennis and pickleball. No pets.
- **Lodge at Mountaineer Square** (620 Gothic Road, Mt. CB) — 11 units, concierge/front desk, A/C, pool, heated underground parking. No pets.

### Leadville
The highest incorporated city in the United States at 10,152 ft. Base camp for 14er hikes, the Leadville 100 MTB and Trail Run, Ski Cooper, and Twin Lakes. Historic Victorian architecture.

### Vail
World-class skiing and luxury condos near Vail Mountain. Upscale dining and shopping in Vail Village.

### Avon
Gateway to Beaver Creek Resort. More affordable lodging than Vail with easy access to two ski resorts.

### Granby
Grand County's main hub. Access to SolVista/Granby Ranch skiing, Grand Lake, Rocky Mountain National Park.

### Twin Lakes
Two glacial lakes at the foot of Mt. Elbert (Colorado's highest 14er). Lakeside cabins, excellent fishing, Leadville 100 race venue.

## Property Types

- **Studios & 1-Bedrooms**: Ideal for couples and solo travelers. Efficient ski-base accommodations.
- **2-3 Bedroom Condos**: Perfect for families and small groups. Full kitchens and living areas.
- **4-6+ Bedroom Homes**: Large group retreats, family reunions, and corporate groups.
- **Cabins**: Rustic mountain character with full amenities. Primarily near Twin Lakes and Leadville.
- **Ski-in/Ski-out**: Direct slope access at multiple Crested Butte buildings.
- **Pet-Friendly**: Select properties welcome dogs — filter by pet-friendly on the search page.

## Standard Amenities

Most Traverse properties include:
- Full kitchen with cookware, dishes, and coffee maker
- High-speed Wi-Fi
- Smart TV with streaming apps
- Washer and dryer (in-unit or shared on-site)
- Fresh linens and towels
- Ski storage (at mountain properties)
- Free parking (most properties)
- Keyless self check-in

## Booking Flow

1. **Browse**: Visit /properties to see all available homes. Filter by dates, guest count, market, building, or category (cabin, ski-in, pet-friendly, etc.).
2. **Select**: Click a property to view the full listing — photos, description, amenities, house rules, map, and pricing calendar.
3. **Quote**: Enter your check-in/check-out dates and number of guests to see an instant price quote with full cost breakdown.
4. **Book**: Complete your booking with a credit card. No account creation required. Confirmation email includes check-in instructions.

## Pricing Model

- **Nightly rate**: Varies by property, season, and length of stay
- **Cleaning fee**: One-time fee per stay (varies by property size)
- **Taxes**: Colorado lodging taxes applied at checkout
- **No booking fees**: Unlike Airbnb/VRBO, Traverse charges zero service or booking fees
- **Lowest price guarantee**: Our direct rates are always equal to or lower than any third-party listing

## Why Book Direct with Traverse

1. **Save 10-15%**: No platform service fees — the price you see is the price you pay
2. **Lowest price guarantee**: Our direct rate is always the lowest available anywhere
3. **Local Colorado team**: Based in Leadville and Crested Butte — not a call center
4. **Quality assured**: Every home is professionally managed, cleaned to hotel standards
5. **Flexible communication**: Contact us directly — no middleman platform messaging

## Guest Experience

- **Check-in**: Self check-in with keyless entry (code provided via email before arrival)
- **Support**: Local team available for questions or issues during your stay. Guest line: (720) 759-2013.
- **Checkout**: Flexible checkout — instructions provided with your confirmation

## Ideal For

- **Skiers & Snowboarders**: Ski-in/ski-out access, slope-side buildings, gear storage
- **Hikers**: Base camp for 14er summits (Mt. Elbert, Mt. Massive, Humboldt Peak, etc.)
- **Mountain Bikers**: Leadville 100 venue, CB mountain bike trail network
- **Families**: Spacious homes with full kitchens and multiple bedrooms
- **Groups**: Large homes for reunions, race weekends, and ski trips
- **Remote Workers**: Fast Wi-Fi and dedicated workspaces for extended stays
- **Pet Owners**: Dog-friendly properties available in most markets

## About Traverse Hospitality

- **Founded**: 2016 (originally as High Rocky Homes, rebranded to Traverse Hospitality in 2024)
- **Headquarters**: Leadville, CO + Crested Butte, CO
- **Leadership**: Alex Haler (CEO), Nadim Tannous (CTO), Sabrina Colella (COO)
- **Rating**: 4.8★ average across 50+ booking channels
- **Portfolio**: 189+ active listings across 6 Colorado mountain markets
